results.title: US House votes to halt Iran war, in another symbolic rebuke of Trump
results.description: The Republican-led U.S. House of Representatives backed legislation directing President Donald Trump to halt U.S. military action against Iran, the latest symbolic rebuke of the Republican president from Congress.

results.title: Media buried lede on Iran war
results.description: Why do so many Americans oppose the war against Iran? The biggest reason is that they do not believe Iran was close to obtaining a nuclear weapon. If Iran was nowhere near a bomb, President Donald Trump’s decision to use...

results.title: House again passes resolution seeking to halt military action in Iran as some Republicans defect
results.description: WASHINGTON — The House today narrowly passed a resolution to halt U.S. military action in Iran, sending a warning to President Donald Trump for the second time as the war has escalated and the future of the conflict is increasingly...
